guideline_name: Indian Psychiatric Society Clinical Practice Guidelines (verify exact guideline/edition)
last_reviewed_by: PLACEHOLDER - not yet reviewed; verify against source and sign off

rules.explanation_for_clinician: SSRIs are a recommended first-line pharmacological option for adult major depressive disorder; choose the specific agent by tolerability, interactions, and comorbidity.
monitoring_required: Review response and emergent suicidality/agitation early in treatment and after dose changes.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Depression with psychotic features: combine an antidepressant with an antipsychotic, or consider ECT, rather than antidepressant monotherapy.
Complete a baseline physical-health assessment and document a psychosocial / psychotherapy plan alongside any medication.
missing_investigations: Baseline physical-health screen and relevant labs per local protocol before pharmacotherapy.
